title: Beautiful But Broke
writer: Arthur Housman, Monte Brice, Manuel Seff
actors: Joan Davis, Jane Frazee, John Hubbard
plot: When theatrical agent Waldo Main (John Eldredge) is inducted into the Army, he turns his currently-clientless agency over to his secretary Dottie Duncan (Joan Davis), who decides to organize an all-girl orchestra to fill the void ...
